api_key.description: Churnkey Data API key. Sent as the x-ck-api-key header; never logged.

app_id.description: Churnkey application id. Sent as the x-ck-app header on every request.

base_url.description: Churnkey API host. Individual streams/writes append their own /v1/data or /v1/api path prefix (the Data API and the Event Tracking API share this host but live at different path prefixes).
